generated_oml:
instance BuildingSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical building in AECO domain, exemplified by Living Lab case study as core physical counterpart for digital twin"
    base:contains BuildingOperationalSensor, BuildingControlActuator, BuildingControlController, ModularServiceArchitecture
]

instance BuildingOperationalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors collecting real-time operational data from physical building"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PhysicalToVirtualDataTransmission
]

instance PhysicalToVirtualDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time data transmission from physical sensors to digital twin via Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware using MQTT protocol for synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BuildingOperationalSensor
]

instance OperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time operational data transmitted from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PhysicalToVirtualDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto, ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware for real-time data transmission via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ditto middleware for real-time data transmission via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive 3D visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance BIMTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM tools for creating and managing building information models"
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering principles for automated transformation of BIM models into deployable DT artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables TwinningProcess
]

instance TwinningProcess : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model-driven deployment process automating extraction of domain semantics and generation of runtime interfaces via model-to-model and model-to-text transformations, with iterative improvement of control policies through runtime data feedback"
]

instance EnrichedBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM models enriched with runtime data providing semantically rich, object-based 3D representations of geometric, spatial, and functional building characteristics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMTools, ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building scenarios"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy optimization, visual comfort, and non-visual health effects"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortInsight, NonVisualHealthEffectsInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Energy optimization based on predictive analytics"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationAction
]

instance VisualComfortManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visual comfort management based on sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortAction
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectsOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Non-visual health effects optimization based on sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides NonVisualHealthEffectsAction
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time operational status of building systems"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated outcomes of building scenarios"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven insights for energy optimization"
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven insights for visual comfort management"
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven insights for non-visual health effects optimization"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of HVAC systems for energy efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualComfortAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of lighting and blinds for visual comfort"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of environmental factors for non-visual health effects"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building data"
]

instance ModularServiceArchitecture : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Modular service-oriented architecture with standardized extension points for integrating multiple services, enabling scalability and adaptability in DT components"
]

instance BuildingControlActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators within Building Control Systems receiving control signals from digital twin to adjust physical building operations"
]

instance BuildingControlController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controllers within Building Control Systems receiving control signals from digital twin to adjust physical building operations"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the digital twin are sent to physical actuators via Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware to adjust Building Control Systems (BCS)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization between physical and virtual components, with continuous data exchange for immediate updates and responses."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A model-driven framework integrating BIM as a semantic backbone with Eclipse Hono and Ditto for data exchange, Unreal Engine for visualization, and modular service-oriented architecture for holistic building life cycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers all building life cycle stages from initial design through construction, operation, and refurbishment phases."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Measured using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to assess the alignment between the digital twin and its physical counterpart."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange via MQTT protocol using Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware for bidirectional communication between physical assets and the digital twin."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems such as AI, sensor networks, and BIM through standardized extension points to ensure interoperability across heterogeneous platforms."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to BIM standards and implementation of standardized extension points for modular service integration to address fragmentation and lack of standardized integration mechanisms in AECO domain."
]
